title: propertyScan1D operation
description: One-dimensional property sweep: vary ONE state variable (T, P, or a mole fraction) across n evenly-spaced points, evaluating the requested properties at each.  Writes a long-form CSV (one row per scan point) ready for plotting -- the PropsView's CsvAutoPlot will render it as a multi-line plot, one trace per property.

vary.title: Scan axis
vary.description: Which variable to sweep, between which limits, and how many points (linearly spaced).

state.title: Held state
state.description: The (T, P, composition) values held fixed -- whichever the `vary.variable` is NOT.  Optional when vary covers the only axis you care about.

properties.title: Properties to evaluate
properties.description: Per-point properties to compute and write to the CSV (Psat_<comp>, T_bubble, gamma_<comp>, Cp_ig, H_ig, S_ig, Z, v_molar, H_R, S_R, H_real, S_real,...).
